positive: A stylized, high-contrast mandala design featuring glowing nebula dust intertwining with bioluminescent tropical flora. The composition is perfectly centered and circular, showcasing deep indigo blues, vibrant teal, and pops of neon magenta. The lines are crisp, detailed, and solid, designed as an ideal repeating pattern or a striking central graphic for apparel. Overhead studio lighting highlights the complex symmetry and ethereal glow, achieving an Art Deco geometric botanical aesthetic. Vector art style, ultra-detailed, clean silhouette, flat graphic design, perfect symmetry.
negative: lowres, blurry, artifact, watermark, text, logo, signature, extra limbs, poorly drawn hands, bad anatomy, noise, grayscale, cartoon, photographic, depth of field
